docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $757.86 FILED BY GERMAN MOTORS COLLISION CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, GINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
